prompt:
Create a raw neo-urban surrealist portrait in a rain-soaked industrial environment, blending fashion photography, street art, and contemporary mixed-media collage. A melancholic young woman in paint-splattered workwear and a translucent raincoat walks through an abandoned concrete structure, accompanied by an unusual animal companion. Wet reflective ground, oversized paint roller, dripping graffiti, torn posters, architectural sketches, abstract geometric shapes, ink splatters, layered textures, and distressed paper elements.

Style inspired by underground gallery art, post-industrial aesthetics, editorial fashion, and urban decay. Muted concrete tones contrasted with vibrant teal, orange, purple, pink, and cyan accents. Dynamic composition, emotional storytelling, gritty realism, high-detail textures, expressive brush strokes, paint drips, collage overlays, hand-drawn diagrams, Japanese typography, environmental concept art, cinematic atmosphere, moody lighting, reflective puddles, depth and perspective, masterpiece quality.

Visual Elements:
• Industrial architecture and brutalist structures
• Abstract circles, lines, technical sketches, and blueprint fragments
• Paint splashes, graffiti marks, torn paper textures
• Rare animal companion (binturong, axolotl, cassowary, raven, etc.)
• Fashion-forward streetwear with artistic stains
